option.name: originalContent
option.value:
services: db: image: postgres:16-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: courier_db POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres ports: - "5434:5432" # 5434 for å unngå konflikt med andre services volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
courier-service: build: . ports: - "8003:8002" environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://db:5432/courier_db SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: postgres SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO: update SERVER_SERVLET_CONTEXT_PATH: / SERVER_PORT: 8002 depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy
volumes: postgres_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: db: image: postgres:16-alpine environment: POSTGRES_DB: courier_db POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres ports: - "5434:5432" # 5434 for å unngå konflikt med andre services volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5
courier-service: build: . ports: - "8003:8002" environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://db:5432/courier_db SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_DRIVER: org.postgresql.Driver SPRING_JPA_DIALECT: org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect SPRING_JPA_HIBERNATE_DDL_AUTO: update SERVER_SERVLET_CONTEXT_PATH: / SERVER_PORT: 8002 depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy
volumes: postgres_data:
